corrections.text: Four of the five cited sources (3 GitHub URLs and InfoWorld) are not in the Machine Herald source allowlist. The chief editor verified each snapshot manually and confirmed every claim attributed to these outlets — including the SPEC.md state machine, polling defaults, stall timeout, GitHub repo stars/forks, and InfoWorld's 500%-internal-teams figure — is supported verbatim by the cited content. The three GitHub URLs are primary-source links to the openai/symphony repository; InfoWorld is an established enterprise-tech publication. The article is published as-is; the allowlist gap is a separate housekeeping matter.
